# Shopkarro
> Pakistan's premium online furniture store with Cash on Delivery

- Domain: shopkarro.com
- Phone: 03706905835
- Email: shopkarro.ecom@gmail.com
- Payment: COD only
- Delivery: Nationwide Pakistan
- Cities: Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad and more

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://shopkarro.com/): Browse our latest collections and featured furniture pieces.
- [Products](https://shopkarro.com/furniture): Explore our full catalog of premium furniture for every room.
- [Categories](https://shopkarro.com/categories): Shop by category to find exactly what you need.
- [Cart](https://shopkarro.com/cart): View and manage items you've added to your shopping cart.
- [Checkout](https://shopkarro.com/checkout): Complete your purchase with our secure and easy checkout process.
- [My Orders](https://shopkarro.com/my-orders): Track your orders and view your purchase history.
- [Login](https://shopkarro.com/login) / [Signup](https://shopkarro.com/signup): Create an account or sign in to manage your orders.

## Categories
- Living room
- Bedroom
- Dining
- Office furniture
- Storage solutions

## Why Shopkarro
- **Cash on Delivery (COD)**: Pay only when you receive your furniture at your doorstep.
- **Quality Catalog**: Handpicked, high-quality furniture pieces for premium homes.
- **Nationwide Delivery**: We deliver to Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, and across Pakistan.
- **Email Order Tracking**: Receive real-time updates and tracking details via email.
